title: QDC Quantum Farming
description: Ever wanted to plant and harvest tools? this is the mod for you.
body:
Ever wanted to plant and harvest tools? this is the mod for you.

You can craft various tool seeds depending on farming level. 

Gain xp when harvesting fully grown tool seeds, to level up the farming level, which can be viewed by interacting with a Quantum Farming Book.

You can gain extra tools when harvesting fully grown tool seeds.

Note: All the plants in this mod are allergic to water.

https://qdc-mod.com/pages/quantum_farming.html for all the recipes
